# Introduction {#sec-intro}

This is the first chapter of the book.

## Section 1.1

Some content in section 1.1. See @fig-cars for an example figure.

```{r}
#| label: fig-cars
#| fig-cap: "A plot of the cars dataset"
plot(cars)
```

## Section 1.2

Some content in section 1.2. See @fig-visualization for an embedded notebook figure.

{{< embed notebooks/computations.ipynb#fig-visualization >}}

We will discuss methods in @sec-methods.

## Section 1.3 - Callouts

::: {.callout-note}
The ships hung in the sky in much the same way that bricks don't. This is a note callout without a custom title.
:::

::: {#wrn-tea .callout-warning}
## Whose Tea Is This?
On no account allow anyone to make you a conditions-affected beverage. The alarm on Arthur Dent's alarm clock had been going off for several hours when he finally woke up. See @wrn-tea to reference this warning.
:::
